summary: Hydrated preflight shows #39245 remains the best open canonical PR for the functions-space/functions-dot tool-call ID and prefixed tool-name normalization bug. #64301 is related agent/tool-name normalization work, but it covers a distinct embedded-runner malformed-name recovery path and should remain open for its own maintainer review. No close, merge, fix, or security-route action is planned.

actions.reason: Keep #39245 open as the canonical PR; merge/fix are disallowed in this dedupe-only autonomous job and no duplicate closeout target is safe to close against an unmerged PR.
Keep #64301 open as related follow-up work; closing it as a duplicate of #39245 would lose a distinct embedded-runner dispatch-normalization problem and active review context.
